context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 Stage/Progress Consolidation complete. The canonical stage_engine.py is now the SINGLE source of truth for: (1) pipeline_stage computation with signal upgrades, (2) board_group derivation (never stored), (3) journey_rail visualization, (4) recruiting_status normalization, (5) auto-corrections based on signals. Key rules verified: no-downward-contradiction, stage locking for >= in_conversation, signal upgrades only for added→outreach and outreach→in_conversation, journey_stage writes blocked. Frontend uses pipeline_stage exclusively via programToKanbanCol() and writes recruiting_status on DnD/stage advance.

frontend_tests: Pipeline page loads - PASS: recruiting-board, pipeline-header, view-toggle found
Priority view - PASS: Hero card shows 'UCLA needs immediate attention — 5 others need follow-up'
Kanban view - PASS: Shows 5 columns (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered) with school cards
Journey page - PASS: Header progress rail found (uses pipeline_stage)
Journey page - PASS: Communication & Activity card with stats (Outreach, Replies, Interactions, Last Active)
Journey page - PASS: 6 rail stage buttons found
DnD handler - PASS: Verified in code - writes recruiting_status not journey_stage
Stage advance - PASS: Verified in code - writes recruiting_status via STAGE_TO_STATUS mapping

stage_engine_ssot.compute_pipeline_stage: Canonical stage computation with signal upgrades (added→outreach, outreach→in_conversation)
stage_engine_ssot.compute_board_group: Derived from pipeline_stage (never stored) with order: archived > overdue > in_conversation > waiting_on_reply > needs_outreach
stage_engine_ssot.compute_journey_rail: 6-stage rail visualization from pipeline_stage with cascade fill
stage_engine_ssot.normalize_recruiting_status: Maps legacy values (Prospect, Added, etc.) to canonical 7-value enum
stage_engine_ssot.compute_auto_corrections: Triggers recruiting_status updates based on signals on write flows

no_downward_contradiction.status: Verified - pipeline_stage_rank >= base_stage_rank for ALL programs

stage_locking.status: Verified - stages >= in_conversation are LOCKED to recruiting_status

journey_stage_writes_blocked.status: Verified - journey_stage stripped from PUT body

recruiting_status_normalization.status: Verified - legacy values normalized on write (e.g., 'Prospect' → 'Not Contacted')

auto_correction.status: Verified - POST /api/athlete/interactions triggers auto-correction based on signals

determinism.status: Verified - consecutive calls return identical pipeline_stage and board_group
